title: Gearing ratio
summary: 9609 A Level — debt vs equity and financial risk.
learningObjectives: Explain high vs low gearing implications.

simpleExplanation.title: Borrowed vs owned capital
simpleExplanation.summary: Gearing shows how much of the business is financed by debt. High gearing magnifies returns but increases risk.
steps: Low gearing: safer but may limit growth.

sections.content: **Gearing** (10.2.4) links **5.2 sources of finance** to **risk evaluation**.
